evals.prompt: Build a mobile-first settings page for our PWA. It needs sections for profile, notifications, language, and account deletion. The app uses dark mode with indigo accent (#6366f1).
evals.expected_output: Settings page following Material/HIG patterns, proper touch targets, accessible contrast, progressive disclosure, destructive action separated

assertions.name: touch-targets-44px
assertions.description: All interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px touch target size

assertions.name: contrast-ratio-aa
assertions.description: Text contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large)

assertions.name: destructive-separated
assertions.description: Account deletion is visually separated from other actions, uses danger color

assertions.name: mobile-first-responsive
assertions.description: Layout is designed mobile-first with proper breakpoints for tablet/desktop

assertions.name: semantic-color-tokens
assertions.description: Uses CSS custom properties / semantic tokens, not raw hex values in components

evals.prompt: Create a data table component showing customer invoices with columns: Invoice #, Customer, Amount, Status, Date. Include sorting, filtering, and a responsive mobile view.
evals.expected_output: Accessible data table with sortable columns, responsive mobile adaptation, proper touch targets, status indicators meeting accessibility rules

assertions.name: sortable-aria
assertions.description: Sortable columns use aria-sort attribute indicating current sort state

assertions.name: mobile-adaptation
assertions.description: Table adapts for mobile (card view, horizontal scroll, or simplified layout)

assertions.name: color-not-only-indicator
assertions.description: Status indicators use icon + color + text, not color alone

assertions.name: empty-state-provided
assertions.description: Shows helpful empty state with guidance when no data exists

assertions.name: loading-state
assertions.description: Shows skeleton or shimmer placeholder while data loads

evals.prompt: Design a multi-step form wizard for creating a new quote (Angebot). Steps: 1) Select customer, 2) Add line items, 3) Review & send. Include validation and progress indicator.
evals.expected_output: Multi-step form with step indicator, proper validation, back navigation, auto-save, confirmation before send

assertions.name: step-indicator-visible
assertions.description: Step indicator or progress bar is visible showing current position

assertions.name: back-navigation
assertions.description: User can navigate back to previous steps without losing data

assertions.name: inline-validation
assertions.description: Validation happens on blur, errors shown near the field with recovery guidance

assertions.name: confirm-before-send
assertions.description: Final send action has a confirmation dialog showing summary of what will be sent

assertions.name: form-autosave
assertions.description: Form auto-saves draft to prevent data loss on accidental navigation

assertions.name: keyboard-accessible
assertions.description: Form is fully navigable via keyboard with visible focus indicators
